recommendations.title: Strengthen Headline Impact
recommendations.description: Add visual punch to the headline through enhanced color contrast, a soft gradient backdrop, or a geometric shape—without increasing its physical size. The moderate attention on the discount message suggests it needs more visual emphasis to register urgency and value immediately.

recommendations.title: Amplify Product Visibility
recommendations.description: Enhance color saturation and contrast in the jacket's yellow, blue, and pink panels, or add subtle highlights to emphasize garment construction. Human-face bias currently draws attention away from the merchandise; strengthening product definition will communicate quality more effectively in the critical opening seconds.

recommendations.title: Unify Logo and Headline
recommendations.description: Cluster the brand logo and headline together as a secondary focal point in the upper-right or center-right area. This reduces visual fragmentation on the left, allowing the model to command primary focus while brand messaging reinforces identity without delaying product discovery.

recommendations.title: Deepen Emotional Narrative with Lifestyle Context
recommendations.description: Refine product image styling and decorative elements to communicate a desired lifestyle or emotional state—such as freedom, discovery, or personal expression—rather than surface-level fun. This elevates emotional resonance and strengthens the motivational hook driving conversion action.

recommendations.title: Reframe Headline for Conversion Motivation
recommendations.description: Shift from benefit-focused language to messaging that emphasizes discovery, personalization, or free trial exclusivity. Adding urgency or personal relevance moves viewers from passive interest to active consideration of the conversion action.

recommendations.title: Enhance Headline Visual Dominance
recommendations.description: Increase contrast between 'Enjoy your favorite songs on-demand' and the gradient background through bolder typography, increased letter spacing, or a semi-transparent panel. This ensures the headline captures attention within the first two seconds and serves as your primary conversion entry point.
